issues.detail: The skill file only covers happy path scenarios and lacks error handling or edge case coverage.
The skill assumes NVIDIA GPU and Linux environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: ONNX text classifier config.pbtxt
scenarios.rationale: Baseline often guesses platform strings and field names (e.g. onnx_runtime instead of onnxruntime_onnx) and forgets max_queue_delay_microseconds; treatment matches the documented pbtxt exactly including dynamic_batching and KIND_GPU instance_group.

scenarios.name: gRPC client batch inference
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to fall back to the HTTP /v2/.../infer endpoint or invents grpcclient APIs; treatment uses tritonclient.grpc with is_server_live/is_model_ready, InferInput.set_data_from_numpy, InferRequestedOutput and result.as_numpy as documented.
